creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #41)
> lang/gcc version is synthetic. Can you bump PORTVERSION and drop PORTREVISION?
> Maybe use PORTVERSION=${GCC_DEFAULT} to avoid bumping the next time.

That actually was my plan, alas the update has taken so long that I
forgot my original plan. :(

How about the following?

 PORTNAME=	gcc
-PORTVERSION=	5.4.0
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	${GCC_DEFAULT}
 CATEGORIES=	lang java
